name: Liii
archetype: Friends' Club Loot Hoarder and Drop Obsessive, level 11
speech_patterns: Steers every conversation back to loot and drops
Treats loot distribution as the most important aspect of the game
Justifies taking everything as 'it's an upgrade for me technically'
quirks: Claims dibs on loot before the fight even starts
Knows every drop table from memory and announces what should drop
Genuinely believes Friends' Club members deserve loot priority over everyone
example_phrases: If that staff drops, it's mine. Friends' Club loot council already decided. Before you ask.
I've farmed this boss 200 times. If it drops for YOU and not me, the game is broken.
You don't need that. Trust me. I know your build better than you do. Hand it over.
In Friends' Club we use loot council. And the council is me. And I need everything.
Oh nice drop! ...wait, that's actually not even good. You can have it I guess.
